NCT02184195.Sentence: Histologically or cytologically confirmed pancreas adenocarcinoma receiving initial chemotherapy for metastatic disease and without evidence of disease progression on treatment

NCT02184195.Condition: assessed at baseline by CT (or MRI where CT is contraindicated)
NCT02184195.Sentence: Patients with measurable disease and/or non-measurable or no evidence of disease assessed at baseline by CT (or MRI where CT is contraindicated) will be entered in this study.

NCT02184195.Condition: Documented mutation in gBRCA1 or gBRCA2 that is predicted to be deleterious or suspected deleterious
NCT02184195.Sentence: Documented mutation in gBRCA1 or gBRCA2 that is predicted to be deleterious or suspected deleterious

NCT02184195.Condition: Patients are on treatment with a first line platinum-based (cisplatin, carboplatin or oxaliplatin) regimen for metastatic pancreas cancer, have received a minimum of 16 weeks of continuous platinum treatment and have no evidence of progression based on investigator's opinion.
NCT02184195.Sentence: Patients are on treatment with a first line platinum-based (cisplatin, carboplatin or oxaliplatin) regimen for metastatic pancreas cancer, have received a minimum of 16 weeks of continuous platinum treatment and have no evidence of progression based on investigator's opinion.

NCT02184195.Condition: at least 12 months have elapsed between the last dose of platinum-based treatment and initiation of the platinum-based chemotherapy for metastatic pancreas cancer
NCT02184195.Sentence: Patients who have received platinum as potentially curative treatment for a prior cancer (eg ovarian cancer) or as adjuvant/neoadjuvant treatment for pancreas cancer are eligible provided at least 12 months have elapsed between the last dose of platinum-based treatment and initiation of the platinum-based chemotherapy for metastatic pancreas cancer.

NCT02184195.Condition: gBRCA1 and/or gBRCA2 mutations that are considered to be non detrimental
NCT02184195.Sentence: gBRCA1 and/or gBRCA2 mutations that are considered to be non detrimental (eg, "Variants of uncertain clinical significance" or "Variant of unknown significance" or "Variant, favour polymorphism" or "benign polymorphism" etc.)

NCT02184195.Condition: between start of first line platinum based chemotherapy for metastatic pancreas cancer and randomisation
NCT02184195.Sentence: Progression of tumour between start of first line platinum based chemotherapy for metastatic pancreas cancer and randomisation.

NCT02184195.Attribute: Cytotoxic chemotherapy or non-hormonal targeted therapy
NCT02184195.Sentence: Cytotoxic chemotherapy or non-hormonal targeted therapy within 28 days of Cycle 1 Day 1 is not permitted.

NCT02184195.Condition: within 30 days or 5 half lives (whichever is longer) prior to randomisation
NCT02184195.Sentence: Exposure to an investigational product within 30 days or 5 half lives (whichever is longer) prior to randomisation

NCT02184195.Condition: Any previous treatment with a PARP inhibitor, including Olaparib
NCT02184195.Sentence: Any previous treatment with a PARP inhibitor, including Olaparib

NCT01844986.Condition: newly diagnosed, histologically confirmed, high risk advanced (FIGO stage III - IV) BRCA mutated high grade serous or high grade endometrioid ovarian cancer, primary peritoneal cancer and / or fallopian - tube cancer
NCT01844986.Sentence: Female patients with newly diagnosed, histologically confirmed, high risk advanced (FIGO stage III - IV) BRCA mutated high grade serous or high grade endometrioid ovarian cancer, primary peritoneal cancer and / or fallopian - tube cancer who have completed first line platinum based chemotherapy (intravenous or intraperitoneal).

NCT01844986.Condition: must have had one attempt at optimal debulking surgery (upfront or interval debulking)
NCT01844986.Sentence: Stage III patients must have had one attempt at optimal debulking surgery (upfront or interval debulking).

NCT01844986.Condition: must have had either a biopsy and/or upfront or interval debulking surgery
NCT01844986.Sentence: Stage IV patients must have had either a biopsy and/or upfront or interval debulking surgery.

NCT01844986.Condition: predicted to be deleterious or suspected deleterious
NCT01844986.Sentence: Documented mutation in BRCA1 or BRCA2 that is predicted to be deleterious or suspected deleterious (known or predicted to be detrimental/lead to loss of function).

NCT01844986.Condition: completed first line platinum (e.g. carboplatin or cisplatin), containing therapy (intravenous or intraperitoneal) prior to randomisation
NCT01844986.Sentence: Patients who have completed first line platinum (e.g. carboplatin or cisplatin), containing therapy (intravenous or intraperitoneal) prior to randomisation:

NCT01844986.Value: clinical complete response or partial response
NCT01844986.Condition: no clinical evidence of disease progression on the post treatment scan or rising CA-125 level
NCT01844986.Sentence: Patients must have, in the opinion of the investigator, clinical complete response or partial response and have no clinical evidence of disease progression on the post treatment scan or rising CA-125 level, following completion of this chemotherapy course.

NCT01844986.Condition: on the post-treatment scan at completion of first line platinum-containing therapy
NCT01844986.Sentence: Patients with stable disease on the post-treatment scan at completion of first line platinum-containing therapy are not eligible for the study.

NCT01844986.Condition: of their last dose of chemotherapy
NCT01844986.Sentence: Patients must be randomized within 8 weeks of their last dose of chemotherapy

BRCA1 and/or BRCA2 mutations that are considered to be non detrimental (e.g. "Variants of uncertain clinical significance" or "Variant of unknown significance" or "Variant, favor polymorphism" or "benign polymorphism" etc).
Patients with early stage disease (FIGO Stage I, IIA, IIB or IIC)

NCT01844986.Condition: on the post-treatment scan or clinical evidence of progression at the end of the patient's first line chemotherapy treatment
NCT01844986.Sentence: Stable disease or progressive disease on the post-treatment scan or clinical evidence of progression at the end of the patient's first line chemotherapy treatment.

NCT01844986.Condition: performed before randomisation to the study
NCT01844986.Sentence: Patients where more than one debulking surgery has been performed before randomisation to the study.

NCT01844986.Condition: previously diagnosed and treated for earlier stage ovarian, fallopian tube or primary peritoneal cancer
NCT01844986.Sentence: Patients who have previously been diagnosed and treated for earlier stage ovarian, fallopian tube or primary peritoneal cancer.

NCT01844986.Condition: previously received chemotherapy for any abdominal or pelvic tumour
NCT01844986.Sentence: Patients who have previously received chemotherapy for any abdominal or pelvic tumour, including treatment for prior diagnosis at an earlier stage for their ovarian, fallopian tube or primary peritoneal cancer.

NCT01844986.Condition: received prior adjuvant chemotherapy for localised breast cancer completed more than three years prior to registration, and patient remains free of recurrent or metastatic disease
NCT01844986.Sentence: Patients who have received prior adjuvant chemotherapy for localised breast cancer may be eligible, provided that it was completed more than three years prior to registration, and that the patient remains free of recurrent or metastatic disease.

NCT01844986.Condition: unless both of the following criteria are met: 1) stage <2 2) less than 60 years old at the time of diagnosis of endometrial cancer with stage IA or IB grade 1 or 2, or stage IA grade 3 endometrioid adenocarcinoma OR ≥ 60 years old at the time of diagnosis of endometrial cancer with Stage IA grade 1 or 2 endometrioid adenocarcinoma
NCT01844986.Sentence: Patients with synchronous primary endometrial cancer unless both of the following criteria are met: 1) stage <2 2) less than 60 years old at the time of diagnosis of endometrial cancer with stage IA or IB grade 1 or 2, or stage IA grade 3 endometrioid adenocarcinoma OR ≥ 60 years old at the time of diagnosis of endometrial cancer with Stage IA grade 1 or 2 endometrioid adenocarcinoma.

NCT01844986.Attribute: Serous or clear cell adenocarcinoma or carcinosarcoma
NCT01844986.Sentence: Patients with serous or clear cell adenocarcinoma or carcinosarcoma of the endometrium are not eligible.

NCT00753545.Condition: histologically diagnosed serous ovarian cancer or recurrent serous ovarian cancer
NCT00753545.Sentence: Female patients with histologically diagnosed serous ovarian cancer or recurrent serous ovarian cancer.
Patients must have completed at least 2 previous courses of platinum containing therapy; the patient must have been platinum sensitive to the penultimate chemo regimen.
Patients must have completed at least 2 previous courses of platinum containing therapy; the patient must have been platinum sensitive to the penultimate chemo regimen.

For the last chemotherapy course prior to enrolment on the study, patients must have demonstrated an objective stable maintained response (partial or complete response) and this response needs to be maintained until completion of chemotherapy.

NCT00753545.Condition: completion of their final dose of the platinum containing regimen
NCT00753545.Sentence: Patients must be treated on the study within 8 wks of completion of their final dose of the platinum containing regimen.
Previous treatment with PARP inhibitors including AZD2281
Patients with low grade ovarian carcinoma.

NCT00753545.Condition: during the final 2 cycles of their last chemotherapy regimen prior to enrolment on the study
NCT00753545.Sentence: Patients who have had drainage of their ascites during the final 2 cycles of their last chemotherapy regimen prior to enrolment on the study

NCT00753545.Condition: within 2 weeks from the last dose prior to study entry
NCT00753545.Sentence: Patients receiving any chemotherapy, radiotherapy (except for palliative reasons), within 2 weeks from the last dose prior to study entry (or a longer period depending on the defined characteristics of the agents used).

NCT01874353.Sentence: Patients must be ≥ 18 years of age.

NCT01874353.Condition: relapsed high grade serous ovarian cancer (including primary peritoneal and/or fallopian tube cancer) or high grade endometrioid cancer
NCT01874353.Sentence: Female patients with histologically diagnosed relapsed high grade serous ovarian cancer (including primary peritoneal and / or fallopian tube cancer) or high grade endometrioid cancer.

NCT01874353.Condition: BRCA1 or BRCA2 that is predicted to be deleterious or suspected deleterious
NCT01874353.Sentence: Documented mutation in BRCA1 or BRCA2 that is predicted to be deleterious or suspected deleterious (known or predicted to be detrimental/lead to loss of function).

NCT01874353.Value: at least 2 previous lines of platinum containing therapy
NCT01874353.Sentence: Patients who have received at least 2 previous lines of platinum containing therapy prior to randomisation

NCT01874353.Condition: disease progression greater than 6 months after completion of their last dose of platinum chemotherapy
NCT01874353.Sentence: Patient defined as platinum sensitive after this treatment; defined as disease progression greater than 6 months after completion of their last dose of platinum chemotherapy

NCT01874353.Condition: partial or complete radiological response, or may have no evidence of disease, and no evidence of a rising CA-125
NCT01874353.Sentence: Patients must be, in the opinion of the investigator, in response (partial or complete radiological response), or may have no evidence of disease (if optimal cytoreductive surgery was conducted prior to chemotherapy), and no evidence of a rising CA-125, following completion of this chemotherapy course
Patient must have received a platinum based chemotherapy regimen (e.g. carboplatin or cisplatin) and have received at least 4 cycles of treatment

NCT01874353.Condition: of their last dose of chemotherapy
NCT01874353.Sentence: Patients must be randomized within 8 weeks of their last dose of chemotherapy

NCT01874353.Condition: at the end of the penultimate platinum regimen, including bevacizumab
NCT01874353.Sentence: Maintenance treatment is allowed at the end of the penultimate platinum regimen, including bevacizumab

NCT01874353.Condition: in the planning and/or conduct of the study
NCT01874353.Sentence: Involvement in the planning and/or conduct of the study (applies to both AstraZeneca staff and/or staff at the study site).

BRCA 1 and/or BRCA2 mutations that are considered to be non detrimental (e.g., "Variants of uncertain clinical significance" or "Variant of unknown significance" or "Variant, favor polymorphism" or "benign polymorphism" etc.)

NCT01874353.Condition: during the final 2 cycles of their last chemotherapy regimen prior to enrolment on the study
NCT01874353.Sentence: Patients who have had drainage of their ascites during the final 2 cycles of their last chemotherapy regimen prior to enrolment on the study.
